text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, listen to this! I thought up an amazing
proverb just now! Here it is:

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"The carrot eaten in morning sunlight tastes
sweetest"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, maybe that's too vague. A proverb should
be more succinct.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"The early Horsegirl gets three carrots"! Yeah, that's
perfect!
